return-response.set-body: {"error":"access_denied","message":"Your identity does not have sufficient access to the Azure AI Foundry resource. Please verify your RBAC role assignment on the Foundry project or resource group."}
{"error":"timeout","message":"The request to Azure AI Foundry timed out. Please retry. If this persists, your query may be too complex or the Foundry service may be experiencing latency."}
